'''navudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacetylcephalosporin|deacetylcephalosporin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacetylcephalosporin|deacetylcephalosporin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| navudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nævidhith|nævidhith]] || [[word:nævidhij|nævidhij]] || [[word:nævidhish|nævidhish]] || [[word:nævidhi|nævidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:navuvudhuth|navuvudhuth]] || [[word:navuvudhuj|navuvudhuj]] || [[word:navuvudhush|navuvudhush]] || [[word:navuvudhu|navuvudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:navudhuth|navudhuth]] || [[word:navudhuj|navudhuj]] || [[word:navudhush|navudhush]] || [[word:navudhu|navudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:navufdhuth|navufdhuth]] || [[word:navufdhuj|navufdhuj]] || [[word:navufdhush|navufdhush]] || [[word:navufdhuf|navufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:navudhuthu|navudhuthu]] || [[word:navudhuju|navudhuju]] || [[word:navudhushu|navudhushu]] || [[word:navudhuku|navudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:navudhuth|navudhuth]] || [[word:navudhuj|navudhuj]] || [[word:navudhush|navudhush]] || [[word:navudhu|navudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:navudhuthul|navudhuthul]] || [[word:navudhujul|navudhujul]] || [[word:navudhushul|navudhushul]] || [[word:navudhukul|navudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:navudhuthuthu|navudhuthuthu]] || [[word:navudhujuju|navudhujuju]] || [[word:navudhushushu|navudhushushu]] || [[word:navudhuku|navudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:navudhuthun|navudhuthun]] || [[word:navudhujun|navudhujun]] || [[word:navudhushun|navudhushun]] || [[word:navudhukun|navudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:navudhuthuoro|navudhuthuoro]] || [[word:navudhujuoro|navudhujuoro]] || [[word:navudhushuoro|navudhushuoro]] || [[word:navudhukuoro|navudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
